title: WaspadaGempa
description: An interactive, high-performance disaster monitor and climate hazard tracker for Indonesia. Features real-time seismic plotting on maps, pulsing magnitude metrics, and predictive climate timeline models (2026-2050).

title: Personal Portfolio Website
description: A responsive portfolio website built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and TypeScript. Features a modern design with high performance.

title: GeoWatch Indonesia
description: An interactive geospatial monitor for tracking active volcanoes and geothermal energy potential in Indonesia. Features real-time alert levels, seismic status, and interactive Leaflet map visualizations.

title: Task Management App
description: A daily task management application featuring drag-and-drop, task categories, and local storage (LocalStorage) persistence.

title: Chat App Interface
description: A real-time chat application interface with a minimalist design, online status, and built-in dark mode.

title: Coffee Shop UI Redesign
description: A local coffee shop website interface redesign focusing on an intuitive ordering flow and modern aesthetics.
